self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: R1 White Fairy's Queening: hitting an opponent with a Charged Attack grants Transcendence, increasing Stellar-Conduct DMG by 16% for 5s (max 3 stacks = +48%; stacks once every 0.2s). Stellar-Conduct is a dedicated DMG type; recorded for reference (no standard stat key). The flat 28% ATK is always-on (self_modifiers).
